summary: Ride-booking app with customer booking form, GPS location capture, and one-way/round-trip logic. Backend runs on ICP canisters. Frontend includes auth gating, health check system, and customer/driver/admin dashboards.
architectural_notes: Health check query should fire unconditionally (no auth gate) — red banner appears when health check is gated behind identityReady/actor state
Customer booking form lives in CustomerDashboard component; shared location helper used by Pickup GPS should be reused for Drop GPS
known_issues: Red 'backend is unreachable' banner persists after logout — health check gated behind auth state (Version 58 regression, unfixed)

existing_features.title: In the customer booking form (RideRequestForm.tsx / CustomerDashboard.tsx), when trip type is One Way: show Drop fields normally and add a 'Drop Location Mode: Manual | GPS' toggle with identical UX to the existing Pickup Location Mode toggle.

When Drop Location Mode is set to GPS (One Way only): capture the device geolocation, store latitude and longitude into the drop location state, and reuse the existing GPS-to-area/pincode helper (already used by Pickup GPS) to auto-fill Drop Area and Drop Pincode fields.

When trip type is Round Trip: disable or hide all Drop input fields, automatically set drop location state equal to pickup location state, and display the helper text 'Round trip: Drop location is same as Pickup.' On form submit, map dropoffLocation to pickupLocation.

When trip type is One Way, on form submit map dropoffLocation to the captured/entered drop location state (dropLocation). Ensure no console.log statements are added and no auth/flicker regressions are introduced.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix Drop GPS + OneWay/RoundTrip logic in Customer booking form (frontend only): add Drop Location Mode toggle for One Way, auto-set drop=pickup for Round Trip, reuse GPS helper for Drop GPS capture
